description: A test script for verifying role search functionality via HTTP API, including seeding roles and checking for 'Manager' in role titles.

methods.name: httpGetJson
methods.description: Performs an HTTP GET request and returns the response as JSON.

methods.description: Seeds the roles database if empty, using predefined role data.

methods.description: Main execution function that seeds data, performs search query, and validates results.
